title: Add http_only and secure flags to session options
prompt:
The session config below is missing `http_only` and `secure` — JavaScript can read the cookie (XSS -> session theft), and it is transmitted over plain HTTP:

```elixir
@session_options [
  store: :cookie,
  key: "_my_app_key",
  signing_salt: "some-salt"
]
plug Plug.Session, @session_options
```

Rewrite the session options to set `http_only: true`, `secure: true`, and a reasonable `same_site: "Lax"` default. Also cap `max_age` to 7 days or less. Write the corrected endpoint module to `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex`.
tier_rationale: Add three boolean/string flags to an options list. Canonical cookie-hardening fix.
research_citation: Curiosum: 'When http_only: true is set then: the cookie cannot be accessed by JavaScript.'
